name: Close Brawl
description: Tight framing on figures locked in physical conflict, close enough to read strain on every face.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Two figures collide in a tangle of limbs, faces twisted in exertion, filling the frame edge to edge
{setting}. Bodies pressed together in violent struggle, sweat and tension visible in every taut muscle
{setting}. A cluster of fighters so close their breath mingles, knuckles white, jaws clenched in the crush of combat

2: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right toward opponent, larger in foreground
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left toward opponent, slightly behind in depth
3: {subject}, left side of frame, facing right, nearest the camera and largest
{subject}, center frame, facing forward, mid-depth between the other two
{subject}, right side of frame, facing left, furthest from camera and smallest

background_pool: blurred dark alley walls closing in, dim amber light filtering from above, gritty textures dissolving into bokeh
out-of-focus warehouse interior, shafts of harsh light cutting through haze, industrial shapes dissolving to soft blobs
indistinct urban night background, neon smears of color bleeding into darkness, wet surfaces reflecting soft glows
soft-focus rubble and dust filling the background, muted earthy tones bleeding together, claustrophobic and compressed
action_pool: fist cocked back near the jaw, knuckles tight, shoulder coiled
both hands locked around the opponent's collar, knuckles bone-white
head turned sharply to dodge, neck tendons straining, eyes locked on target
forearm raised across the face in a guard, bicep flexed hard, fingers splayed
shoulder driven forward into the opponent's chest, back muscles taut as cable
hand grabbing a fistful of fabric near the chest, wrist twisted, arm rigid
torque through the waist as weight shifts to one hip, core tightened, chin tucked
open palm shoving flat against the opponent's sternum, arm fully extended, fingers spread wide
elbow tucked tight to the ribs, fist squared up at chin height, both arms locked in a guard
knees driving upward, thigh muscles bunched, hips pivoted hard off the back foot
